message.content: The page has a light blue background. At the top left, the word "Color" is displayed in a light blue font. Below this heading, there are three rounded rectangular color swatches arranged horizontally. The first swatch on the left has a dark teal background with the hex code "#004346" in white text. The middle swatch has a medium teal background with the hex code "#508991" in white text. The third swatch on the right has a dark navy background with the hex code "#172A3A" in white text.
